title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXV. Riddles.
content:
[A Cinder-sifter.]

        A riddle, a riddle, as I suppose,
        A hundred eyes, and never a nose.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCXXV. Riddles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
